target_0.brief_supporting_logic: target body shows extensive structural collapse; upper floors missing; debris field at base; visible damage to facade and windows; consistent with 45 to 75 percent area damaged

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: target body shows catastrophic structural collapse; upper floors and walls extensively missing; debris field indicates total loss of structural integrity

summary: Two targets assessed: 1 building with SEVERE DAMAGE (PROBABLE confidence) and 1 building with DESTROYED (PROBABLE confidence). The scene shows a heavily damaged urban area with collapsed structures and a large debris field under a partly cloudy sky. The likely functional impact is severe degradation or loss of capability for the assessed targets.
